nodes.label: Insurance Amount Overstated
nodes.description: Reported insured_amount exceeds the correct regulatory limit for the depositor/ORC combination.

nodes.label: Insurance Amount Understated
nodes.description: Reported insured_amount is below the correct regulatory coverage for the depositor/ORC combination.

nodes.label: ORC Code Misclassified
nodes.description: Account or trust is assigned an incorrect ORC code, leading to wrong coverage calculation.

nodes.label: Pipeline Reconciliation Break
nodes.description: Balances or record counts do not reconcile between pipeline stages.

nodes.label: Wire Processed Without OFAC Clearance
nodes.description: Wire transaction settled or included in insurance without OFAC screening completed.

nodes.label: Unresolvable Account Silently Defaulted
nodes.description: Account that should be routed to the pending file was silently assigned SGL due to missing pending code configuration.

nodes.label: Insurance Applied Per-Account Not Per-Depositor
nodes.description: The calculation engine applies SMDIA per individual account rather than aggregating all accounts for a depositor under the same ORC before applying the limit.

nodes.label: IRR ORC Branch Missing in Code
nodes.description: The ORC assignment and insurance calculation programs have no implementation path for IRR (Irrevocable Trust) accounts. These accounts fall through to SGL default.

nodes.label: EBP Coverage Uses Plan Headcount Not Vested Participants
nodes.description: EBP insurance is capped at $250K (one SMDIA) for the entire plan instead of calculating $250K per vested participant as required by 12 CFR 330.14.

nodes.label: Hold Amount Subtracted from Allocated Balance
nodes.description: The transformation stage incorrectly subtracts hold_amount from balance before passing to the insurance calculator, reducing the insurance basis.

nodes.label: OFAC Screening Runs in 6-Hour Batch Cycle
nodes.description: The ofac_screening.py engine is designed for batch execution with up to 6-hour lag. Real-time wires enter settlement before screening completes.

nodes.label: Only Primary Beneficiaries Counted for REV Coverage
nodes.description: TRUST-INSURANCE-CALC.cob filters beneficiaries to PRIMARY type only. CONTINGENT and REMAINDER beneficiaries are excluded, understating REV trust coverage.

nodes.label: Deceased Beneficiaries Not Filtered from Coverage Count
nodes.description: TRUST-INSURANCE-CALC.cob does not filter out beneficiaries with is_deceased=TRUE. Each deceased beneficiary incorrectly adds $250K to the reported insured total.

nodes.label: Custodial Accounts Default to SGL ORC
nodes.description: Accounts with trust_type=CUS are assigned SGL ORC instead of mapping to the underlying ownership class (e.g., CRA for IRA custodial accounts).

nodes.label: ACH NSF Returns Not Netted from Insurance Basis
nodes.description: The wire reconciliation stage counts ACH SETTLED credits but does not deduct ACH RETURNED debits, overstating the insurance basis for affected depositors.

nodes.label: Government Deposit Collateral Flag Not Verified
nodes.description: GOV ORC accounts require collateral for uninsured portions per 12 CFR 330.15. The collateral_pledged flag is not evaluated during validation or calculation.

nodes.label: JNT Co-Owner Natural Person Check Not Performed
nodes.description: ORC-ASSIGNMENT.cob does not verify that JNT co-owners are natural persons per 12 CFR 330.9. Business entities could be incorrectly classified as JNT.

nodes.label: Depositor-Level Aggregation Not Implemented
nodes.description: The core insurance calculation was written to process accounts individually without aggregating by depositor+ORC. This architectural gap causes systematic overstatement of insured amounts for multi-account depositors.

nodes.label: ORC Code Has No Implementation Path
nodes.description: The ORC assignment and insurance calculation programs were not updated when the IRR ORC category was added to the regulatory framework. The code has no branch for IRR, causing silent SGL fallthrough.

nodes.label: Regulatory Parameter Hardcoded in Properties File or Code
nodes.description: Key regulatory parameters (SMDIA, SDN update frequency, supported ORC list) are hardcoded in configuration files or source code instead of being loaded from a configurable parameter table.

nodes.label: Configuration Missing Required Entries
nodes.description: The configuration file is missing required entries (pending codes P06-P10, IRR ORC in supported list). This causes silent fallback behavior instead of explicit routing.

nodes.label: Screening System Architecture is Batch-Only
nodes.description: ofac_screening.py was designed as a batch process from inception. The architecture does not support synchronous screening calls at settlement time, creating a structural gap in compliance.

nodes.label: Beneficiary Status Filter Not Applied in Calculation
nodes.description: The trust insurance calculation fetches all beneficiary records without filtering by type (PRIMARY/CONTINGENT/REMAINDER) or life status (is_deceased). Both gaps were present in the original implementation.

nodes.label: Required Validation Rule Not Coded
nodes.description: A required validation check (COB cutoff enforcement, MT202 CIF requirement, natural person verification) was not implemented in the relevant code path.

nodes.label: DEPOSIT-INSURANCE-CALC.cob
nodes.description: COBOL program responsible for calculating FDIC deposit insurance per ORC category. Written 2008-03-15. Contains multiple known compliance gaps.

nodes.label: ORC-ASSIGNMENT.cob
nodes.description: COBOL program responsible for classifying deposit accounts into FDIC ORC categories. Written 2007-11-20. Missing IRR branch; silently defaults unresolvable accounts to SGL.

nodes.label: TRUST-INSURANCE-CALC.cob
nodes.description: COBOL program for trust/custody insurance calculation. Contains 10 documented known issues including IRR not implemented, contingent beneficiary exclusion, and deceased beneficiary overcounting.

nodes.label: ofac_screening.py
nodes.description: Python OFAC/sanctions screening engine. Batch-mode only, SDN-only, 85% match threshold, no fuzzy matching for non-Western names, no entity resolution.

nodes.label: sp_calculate_insurance.sql
nodes.description: SQL stored procedure for deposit insurance calculation. Calculates per-account, not per-depositor. Hardcoded SMDIA. IRR falls through to SGL. No COB cutoff.

nodes.label: sp_calculate_wire_insurance.sql
nodes.description: SQL stored procedure for wire transfer insurance calculation. Per-customer not aggregated. No cross-system aggregation. GOV collateral not checked. ACH returns not deducted.

nodes.label: insurance-rules.properties
nodes.description: Configuration file for insurance rules. Hardcoded SMDIA. EBP mode=PER_PLAN. Only P01-P05 pending codes. IRR not in supported ORC list. No checksum generation. PII unencrypted.

nodes.label: pipeline/stages/transformation.py
nodes.description: Python pipeline transformation stage. Responsible for normalizing raw records and passing them to downstream stages. Risk of incorrectly subtracting hold_amount from balance.
